file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive guide for feature specification process
key_sections: When to create specs (clear inclusion/exclusion criteria)
5-phase process: Planning, Writing, Review, Implementation, Completion
Relationship to other documentation (README, ROADMAP, ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING)
Change log format for tracking updates
file_insights.notable_features: Clear MoSCoW prioritization, emoji headers for scannability, cross-document linking structure, explicit guidance on what not to spec

file_insights.purpose: Standardized structure for all feature specifications
key_sections: Metadata (Status, Version, Priority, Effort, Owner, Updated date)
Technical Design (Architecture, Components, Data Models, APIs, Dependencies, Security)
file_insights.notable_features: Status badges for tracking progress, checkbox format for actionable items, includes both must-haves and nice-to-haves, security considerations section

patterns_discovered.description: Specs are created before implementation to establish clarity and alignment
patterns_discovered.evidence: Explicit planning phase requirement, review & approval process, spec-to-PR linking

patterns_discovered.description: Specs only required for significant work; excludes minor fixes and refactoring
patterns_discovered.evidence: Clear 'Don't create specs for' section listing minor bug fixes, styling changes, documentation updates

patterns_discovered.description: Feature specs link to and complement other documentation (ROADMAP, ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING)
patterns_discovered.evidence: Explicit relationship table showing how docs complement each other, flow diagram from ROADMAP → Spec → ARCHITECTURE → PR

patterns_discovered.description: Requirements categorized into Must Have (P1), Should Have (P2), Could Have (P3)
patterns_discovered.evidence: PR-1/PR-2/PR-3 notation in template, helps scope management

patterns_discovered.description: Specifications grounded in user stories and success metrics
patterns_discovered.evidence: Dedicated user story section with 'As a... I want... So that...' format, success metrics in overview

patterns_discovered.description: Specs are updated during implementation with change logs tracking decisions
patterns_discovered.evidence: Change Log section with timestamp and reason for each update, instruction to update spec as implementation progresses

gotchas_discovered.risk: Feature specs must be kept synchronized with implementation; outdated specs become misleading
gotchas_discovered.mitigation_suggested: Establish code review practice of validating spec alignment; consider automated validation

gotchas_discovered.risk: Full template has 475 lines; developers might skip sections or feel it's excessive for simpler features
gotchas_discovered.mitigation_suggested: Document addresses this with 'mark as N/A if unsure' guidance, but enforcement unclear

gotchas_discovered.risk: TEMPLATE.md is truncated in diff output (20782 chars total); full content not visible for validation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation_suggested: Review complete template file separately to ensure all sections are well-structured

gotchas_discovered.risk: Change logs require manual maintenance; may be inconsistently applied across specs
gotchas_discovered.mitigation_suggested: Consider template reminder or validation script to ensure change logs are maintained

gotchas_discovered.risk: Template includes 'Estimated Effort' field but provides no calibration or historical reference data
gotchas_discovered.mitigation_suggested: Accumulate completed specs to establish effort estimation benchmarks

approach_outcome.what_was_accomplished: Established comprehensive documentation framework for feature specifications with reusable template and detailed process guide
artifacts_created: docs/features/README.md - 245-line process documentation with examples and guidance
docs/features/TEMPLATE.md - 475-line reusable template with 9+ major sections
key_achievements: Clear criteria for when specs are needed vs. optional
5-phase process documented with specific steps and outputs
Template ensures consistency across all future feature specs
Quality checklist with 12 verification items for completeness
Change management process documented for spec updates
approach_outcome.completeness: Template appears complete but truncated in diff; structure and purpose are clear

recommendations.recommendation: Create example feature specifications for MVP features (Item Management, Barcode Scanning, Category System, Low Stock Alerts) to demonstrate template in practice
recommendations.rationale: Concrete examples help team understand template expectations and provide reference for future specs

recommendations.recommendation: Implement GitHub Actions workflow or pre-commit hook to validate specs against template structure and checklist requirements
recommendations.rationale: Automates compliance with quality standards; prevents incomplete or malformed specs from being committed

recommendations.recommendation: Establish effort estimation baseline by tracking actual time spent vs. estimated effort for first 3-5 specs
recommendations.rationale: Creates historical data for more accurate future estimates; helps identify estimation bias patterns

recommendations.recommendation: Add mandatory PR linking section to template where spec can reference implementation pull requests and commits
recommendations.rationale: Closes the loop between spec planning and implementation; enables future developers to see decision rationale

recommendations.recommendation: Add 'Architecture Decisions' section to template for recording design choices and alternatives considered but rejected
recommendations.rationale: Prevents repeated exploration of same options; documents why certain approaches were chosen over alternatives

recommendations.recommendation: Create minimal and comprehensive template variants (basic for P3 features, full for P1 features) to reduce perceived overhead
recommendations.rationale: Reduces friction for minor features while maintaining rigor for critical work; addresses potential template fatigue

recommendations.recommendation: Create index file (docs/features/INDEX.md) listing all specs with status, dependencies, and blocking relationships
recommendations.rationale: Enables project-level dependency visualization; helps identify critical path and scheduling constraints
